data.content: Implementation review rejected: 10 ESLint warnings remain in 6 of the 14 in-scope files. Specific violations: (1) beat-detail.tsx — 2 max-len violations at lines 352, 371. (2) beat-form.tsx — BeatForm function is 176 lines, exceeds 100-line limit. (3) beat-metadata-details.tsx — max-len at line 191. (4) move-to-project-dialog.tsx — MoveToProjectDialog is 110 lines, exceeds 100-line limit. (5) notes-dialog.tsx — max-len at line 29. (6) settings-dispatch-global-swap.tsx — SettingsDispatchGlobalSwap is 145 lines, exceeds 100-line limit. (7) settings-sheet.tsx — SettingsSheet is 161 lines, exceeds 100-line limit, plus 2 max-len violations at lines 119-120. Acceptance criteria requires zero warnings from max-lines, max-lines-per-function, or max-len in all 14 listed files.
